title: Turning $200,000 into $1 Million  A Systematic Trading Method
author: Zealousideal-Hat4801
selftext:
Over time, my investment portfolio grew from approximately $200,000 to around $1 million.

What surprised me most was not the returns themselves, but rather the enhanced stability of the portfolio once I had simplified everything.

In the past, I often overcomplicated matters  constantly switching strategies and searching for superior methods. In reality, however, this approach did more harm than good, ultimately hindering my execution.

My current approach is remarkably simple: I begin by analyzing a higher time frame (the 4-hour chart) to identify the trading range; I then wait for sufficient liquidity to become available, executing a trade only after confirming that the market structure is aligned correctly.

The true differentiator lies in my steadfast adherence to a strategy focused on  selectively reducing  the frequency of trades, rather than increasing it.

While this may not constitute a revolutionary innovation, organizing all these elements into a repeatable framework has proven immensely valuable to me.

Over time, I have continued to refine and more clearly document my methodology primarily to ensure the consistency of my strategy.

Over time, the key lies in repeatedly executing the correct processes. I have compiled my specific configuration settings into a folder and am sharing them completely free of charge with anyone who needs them. Creating this configuration was no easy feat, so let's keep up the hard work!

replies.author: Zealousideal-Hat4801
replies.body: Could you please send me a message?
